title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: lftp bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for lftp is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: LFTP is a file transfer utility for File Transfer Protocol (FTP), Secure File Transfer Protocol (SFTP), Hypertext Transfer Protocol (HTTP), and other commonly used protocols. It uses the readline library for input, and provides support for bookmarks, built-in monitoring, job control, and parallel transfer of multiple files at the same time.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): New regression - "cannot seek on data source" in TLS lftp sessions. [rhel-8] (JIRA:RHEL-108115)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
full_text:
An update for lftp is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

LFTP is a file transfer utility for File Transfer Protocol (FTP), Secure File Transfer Protocol (SFTP), Hypertext Transfer Protocol (HTTP), and other commonly used protocols. It uses the readline library for input, and provides support for bookmarks, built-in monitoring, job control, and parallel transfer of multiple files at the same time.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): New regression - "cannot seek on data source" in TLS lftp sessions. [rhel-8] (JIRA:RHEL-108115)
